criteria.text: Given a feedback record is built, When enrichment runs, Then all derivable fields (version, git email+name, ticket, branch kind, repo id, timestamp UTC, platform) are auto-filled with no manual entry.

Given fields that cannot be resolved by the tool (Jira accountId, Claude Code version, model, sessionId), When they are unavailable, Then they are omitted and the record is still built; anonymous mode omits all identity fields.
